LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 212, MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION, CALENDAR OF JUN-11-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS EXTENDED TO JULY 19,1998. THIS IS THE FINAL CONTINUANCE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-16-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB-22-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

DONALD S. MITCHELL, JUDGE, IHAMMER, CLERK, RFUNG, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. PLNTF APPEARING BY WADE V. SHANG AND DEF APPEARING BY KAREN E. KIRBY. 1:47 DEF MO IN LIMINE ARGUED AND GRANTED. 2:30 PROSPECTIVE JURORS WERE SWORN AND THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONDUCTED VOIR DIRE. PLAINTIFF PEREMPTORILY CHALLENGED AND THE COURT EXCUSED WILLIAM BARLAK AND DAVID DONNENFIELD. THE DEF PEREMPTORILY CHALLENGED AND THE COURT EXCUSED DONNA T. ANDERSON. THEREAFTER, THE COURT ADMONISHED THE REMAINING PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND CONTINUED THE MATTER UNTIL 23 FEB 99.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, SUBMISSION OF JUDGMENT STATUS, VERDICT REACHED CONTINUED TO JUN-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212

C/C PURSUANT TO CONTINUANCE. COURT, COUNSEL AND JURY PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. 9:45 ALAN KONG WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED ON BEHALF OF THE PLNTF 9:57 CHERLYN GERADO, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, RESUMED THE STAND. DEF EXHIBITS F, DEPO OF GERARDO, G, SET OF INTERROGS & ANS, I AND J, DISABILITY SLIPS AND PLNTF EXHIBIT 9, SETON RADIO- LOGY DOCUMENT, WERE MARKED. 12:23 COUNSEL STIPULATE AS TO THE ISSUE OF PROPERTY DAMAGE PLNTF RESTS. 12:24 JURY ADMONISHED AND ORDERED TO RETURN AT 9:30, 2/25/99 12:30 LUNCH 2:20 COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS JURY INSTRUCTIONS. PLNTF EXHIBITS 6 AND 9, AND DEF EXHIBITS I AND J ARE ADMITTED. 2:52 MATTER CONTINUED TO FEB 25, 1999.
